category_sources: source_facts.description: Golang struct to TypeScript class/interface converter.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the best documentation surface found from source_facts.homepage/repo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tkrajina/typescriptify-golang-structs; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a CLI converting Go structs to TypeScript classes/interfaces.
